$comment: ClinicOS performance budgets (Phase 9 · Part 5). Text assets (JS/CSS/HTML) are measured GZIPPED — that is what ships over the wire. Binary assets (fonts/images) are already compressed, so they are measured RAW. Source maps (*.map) are excluded. Rationale for each number: docs/engineering/PerformanceBudgets.md. Tighten over time; never loosen without an ADR.
